nodes.label: Single Pinned Configuration Ref
nodes.rationale: Exactly one pinned ref makes configuration behavior deterministic across events and isolates privileged execution from untrusted pull-request configuration.

nodes.label: Triggering-Ref Configuration Risk
nodes.rationale: Reading whichever ref triggered the run is nondeterministic and can expose write credentials to untrusted configuration.

nodes.label: Configuration Security Boundary
nodes.rationale: Ignoring all non-pinned refs ensures proposed configuration is never executed with privileged credentials.
